wikitext:
{{Power Infobox|Doom|2}}
{{BD|Doom||2}} is a {{2|Debuffs|Debuff}} that the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}} can apply to enemies, or to herself.

At the end of its turn, if an enemy's HP is less than or equal to its {{BD|Doom||2}}, it will die. If the Necrobinder or another character ends their turn with HP less than or equal to their than Doom, they will die.

{{BD|Doom||2}} does not interact with {{KW|Block||2}}, and each {{BD|Artifact||2}} stack will negate all {{BD|Doom||2}} applied by a single source. 

== Sources ==

==== Cards ====
'''On Enemies:'''
* {{C|Blight Strike||2}}: Apply {{BD|Doom||2}} equal to damage dealt.
* {{C|Negative Pulse||2}}: 7(11) {{BD|Doom||2}} to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Scourge||2}}: 13(16) {{BD|Doom||2}}.
* {{C|Countdown||2}}: At the start of your turn, 6(9) {{BD|Doom||2}} to a random enemy.
* {{C|Deathbringer||2}}: 21(26) {{BD|Doom||2}}.
* {{C|No Escape||2}}: 10(15) {{BD|Doom||2}}, plus an additional 5 {{BD|Doom||2}} for every 10 {{BD|Doom||2}} already on this enemy.
* {{C|End of Days||2}}: 29(37) {{BD|Doom||2}}.
* {{C|Oblivion||2}}: Whenever you play a card this turn, apply 3(4) {{BD|Doom||2}} to the enemy.
* {{C|Reaper Form||2}}: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply that much {{BD|Doom||2}}.

'''On Self:'''
* {{C|Neurosurge||2}}: At the start of your turn, apply 3 {{BD|Doom||2}} to yourself.

==== Potions ====
*{{P|Potion of Doom||2}}: 33 {{BD|Doom||2}}.

== Interactions ==
===Cards===
* {{C|Death's Door||2}}: If you applied {{BD|Doom||2}} this turn, gain {{KW|Block||2}} 2 additional times.
* {{C|Shroud||2}}: Whenever you apply {{BD|Doom||2}}, gain 2(3) {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{C|End of Days||2}}: Kill enemies with at least as much {{BD|Doom||2}} as HP.
* {{C|Misery||2}}: Apply any debuffs on the enemy to ALL other enemies.
* {{C|Time's Up||2}}: Deal damage equal to the enemy's {{BD|Doom||2}}.
===Relics===
* {{R|Book Repair Knife||2}}: Whenever a non-{{BD|Minion||2}} enemy dies to {{BD|Doom||2}}, heal 3 HP.
* {{R|Undying Sigil||2}}: Enemies with at least as much {{BD|Doom||2}} as HP deal 50% less damage.

===Other===
* Since {{KW|Doom||2}} kills characters without changing their HP, {{KW|Intangible||2}}, {{BD|Slippery||2}}, {{BD|Hardened Shell||2}}, and {{R|Beating Remnant||2}} do not prevent creatures from dying to it.
* If an enemy dies to {{BD|Doom||2}}, the card drawn by the {{R|Gremlin Horn||2}} will be held for the start of the player turn.

[[Category:Game Mechanics]]
